summary: Tested NEW session-based favorites system for Golf Mallorca portal. All core functionality working correctly. Found one UI overlap issue on hotel cards with discount badges.

ui_bugs.issue: Discount badge ('Save X%') overlaps with favorite button on hotel cards. Badge at top-6 right-6 overlaps with favorite button at top-3 right-3. Users can still click with force=True but normal clicks may be intercepted.

desktop_tests.floating_favorites_button_visible: PASS - Button visible at bottom-right with z-50
desktop_tests.badge_hidden_when_empty: PASS - Count badge not shown when favorites=0
desktop_tests.empty_panel_state: PASS - Shows 'Your list is empty' message
desktop_tests.golf_favorite_button: PASS - Visible at top-left position, toggles correctly
desktop_tests.hotel_favorite_button: PASS - Visible at top-right position (with overlap issue on discounted hotels)
desktop_tests.toggle_favorite_state: PASS - Heart fills red when active, outline when inactive
desktop_tests.grouped_items_in_panel: PASS - Items grouped by type (Golf Courses, Hotels, etc.)
desktop_tests.remove_item_button: PASS - Trash icon removes individual items
desktop_tests.clear_all_button: PASS - Removes all favorites and shows empty state

mobile_tests.floating_button_visible: PASS - Button visible at bottom-right on mobile
mobile_tests.panel_full_width: PASS - Panel is 390px (full width on mobile)
mobile_tests.remove_button_always_visible: PASS - Remove button visible without hover on mobile
mobile_tests.close_with_x_button: PASS - Panel closes with X button

heart_button_positions.golf_cards: PASS - Heart at top-left (absolute top-3 left-3)
heart_button_positions.hotel_cards: PASS - Heart at top-right (absolute top-3 right-3)
heart_button_positions.restaurant_cards: PASS - Heart at top-right (absolute top-3 right-3)
heart_button_positions.beach_club_cards: PASS - Heart at top-right (absolute top-3 right-3)
heart_button_positions.cafe_bar_cards: PASS - Heart at top-right (absolute top-3 right-3)

passed_tests: Floating favorites button visible in bottom-right corner
Empty state message when no favorites
Panel slides from right with backdrop overlay
Panel width: 384px on desktop, full-width on mobile
Heart icons visible on all card types (golf, hotel, restaurant, beach club, cafe/bar)
Heart toggle: fills red when active, outline when inactive
Favorites grouped by type in panel
Remove button works on individual items
Clear all button removes all favorites
action_items: FIX: HotelPartners.jsx - Move favorite button position to avoid overlap with discount badge. Options: (1) Move favorite button to left side like golf cards, or (2) Move discount badge to different position, or (3) Adjust z-index so favorite button is above discount badge
critical_code_review_comments: FavoritesContext.jsx: Well-implemented with useCallback for performance optimization
FavoriteButton.jsx: Good use of e.stopPropagation() to prevent card flip on click
FavoritesPanel.jsx: Proper z-index layering (backdrop z-[60], panel z-[70])
HotelPartners.jsx Line 63-68: Favorite button at top-3 right-3 overlaps with discount badge at top-6 right-6 on hotels with discounts

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features working, one UI overlap issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 tested the NEW session-based favorites system. All core functionality works: floating button, panel, add/remove favorites, clear all, session storage persistence. One issue found: on hotel cards with discount badges, the 'Save X%' badge overlaps with the favorite button (both positioned in top-right area). The favorite button still works with force clicks but may have UX issues for normal users. Cookie consent can be dismissed with localStorage key 'gim_cookie_consent'. Use 390x844 for mobile and 1920x800 for desktop testing.
